title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Sunteck Realty

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Sunteck Realty
jsonLd.description:
Sunteck Realty, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
